# Pull Request

## Developer Information

Developer Name:

<!-- Example: rohit -->

GitHub Username:

<!-- Example: rohitramteke2 -->

---

## Project

Project Name:

<!-- Example: bajaj-electricals -->

Project Folder:

<!-- Example: projects/bajaj-electricals -->

---

## Changes Made

Describe the changes you made.

Examples:

* Added automation script
* Updated workflow configuration
* Fixed validation logic

---

## Files Modified

List the main files modified.

Example:

developers/rohit/script.js
projects/bajaj-electricals/workflow.json

---

## Testing Done

Explain how the changes were tested.

Example:

* Tested in Zoho sandbox
* Verified automation trigger
* Checked logs

---

## Checklist

Before submitting this PR, confirm the following:

* [ ] Changes are inside the correct folder
* [ ] Folder naming follows repository rules
* [ ] No other developer folders were modified
* [ ] Code tested successfully
* [ ] Documentation updated if required
